warheads.name: 10 kt Fission Warhead
warheads.description: Tactical fission warhead for short-range missiles. Chagai-I test 1998. Estimated 10-12 kt.

warheads.name: 40 kt Boosted Fission
warheads.description: Boosted fission warhead for Shaheen missiles. Estimated 30-45 kt. Pakistan's standard strategic warhead.

warheads.name: Nasr Tactical Warhead
warheads.description: Very low yield tactical nuclear warhead for Nasr (Hatf-9) SRBM. Battlefield nuclear option. Est. 5-10 kt.

delivery_systems.name: Shaheen-III (Hatf-6)
delivery_systems.description: Pakistan's longest-range ballistic missile. Covers all of India including Andaman Islands.

delivery_systems.name: Shaheen-II (Hatf-6A)
delivery_systems.description: Main strategic IRBM. Covers all major Indian cities. Solid-fueled, road-mobile TEL.

delivery_systems.name: Ghauri-II (Hatf-5A)
delivery_systems.description: Liquid-fueled MRBM based on No-dong technology. Longer range than Ghauri-I.

delivery_systems.name: Ababeel MRBM
delivery_systems.description: Pakistan's first MIRV-capable missile. 3 warheads, MaRV maneuvering capability. Counters Indian ABM.

delivery_systems.name: Babur-3 (Hatf-7) SLCM
delivery_systems.description: Sea-launched cruise missile from conventional submarine (Agosta-90B). Nuclear-tipped SLCM.

delivery_systems.name: Nasr (Hatf-9) SRBM
delivery_systems.description: Short-range tactical nuclear rocket. Quick-response battlefield nuclear option vs. Indian Cold Start doctrine.

delivery_systems.name: Ra'ad ALCM (Hatf-8)
delivery_systems.description: Air-launched cruise missile on Mirage III/V. Ra'ad-II extends range to 550 km.

delivery_systems.name: F-16A/B (nuclear role)
delivery_systems.description: Primary nuclear strike aircraft. 36 F-16A/B with suspected nuclear gravity bomb capability.
